description_long: This is a large, modern industrial factory building characterized by a rectangular structure with a series of three sloped roof sections and a prominent two-story front office area. The building features two tall smokestacks emitting stylized smoke, indicating active industrial processes. The facade includes several large industrial windows and multiple wide loading dock doors, suitable for freight and vehicle access. The exterior is finished in dark brown and gray tones, with metallic and concrete elements visible around the base and roof. A sign labeled 'FISHBOE' is mounted above the main entrance, and there is visible rooftop and side-mounted machinery, such as HVAC units. The overall design is functional, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on utility and accessibility.
description: A modern industrial factory building with two tall smokestacks, large industrial windows, multiple loading dock doors, and a dark brown and gray exterior.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing a single smokestack, the main office entrance, and three loading dock doors.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting both smokestacks, the sloped roof sections, the main entrance with a sign, and large industrial windows.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the full length of the building, three sloped roof sections, and visible rooftop and side-mounted machinery.
description_view_3: Rear-right view focusing on both smokestacks and the angular roof layout, with less detail on entrances or windows.
